/usr/bin/g++  -Wall -Wextra -Wpedantic -g CMakeFiles/benchmark_validation.dir/engine/bench/benchmark_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_validation.dir/engine/bench/graph_generator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_validation.dir/engine/bench/system_info.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark_validation.dir/engine/bench/metrics.cpp.o -o benchmark_validation  libcpm_core.a
